facebook.caption: POV: you're wandering Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi and walk straight into Quán Ăn 93. No big sign. No tourist menu. Just a local bistro with 340 reviews and a 4.3-star track record. The kind of place regulars don't share. You almost kept walking. Don't. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Ducking into Quán Ăn 93 off Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi. 340 reviews. Locals filling every table. This is what eating right in Phu Quoc actually looks like. Tag your travel buddy.

instagram.caption: Walked past Quán Ăn 93 twice. Went in on the third pass. 4.3 stars, 340 reviews, zero tourist theatrics. Comment your favorite Phu Quoc dish.
instagram.video_caption: Quán Ăn 93 on Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi. Packed with locals. 4.3 stars. Just eat here.

tiktok.caption: Almost missed Quán Ăn 93. 340 reviews of locals being right. Don't walk past this one. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel

video_script.hook: Walked past 3 times. Don't be me.
scenes: Street-level shot: 93/185 Đường Nguyễn Văn Trỗi sign
Push through entrance, locals seated inside
Close-up: steaming bowls hitting the table
Pan across packed dining room, no tourists
Hand lifts chopsticks, first bite reaction
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
